strengths: 20+ years of progressive software engineering with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating technical leadership across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing direct hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI tooling and agentic workflows
Founded GISCollective platform (2016-present), demonstrating entrepreneurial thinking and ability to design systems for specialized user communities
concerns: AI expertise appears confined to current role (1 year); no evidence of recognized AI products, publications, or strategic platforms built earlier in career
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption, or identifying future product directions—experience is primarily execution-focused
Missing preferred qualifications (Master's/PhD in AI); educational background is fine arts and computer science rather than AI-specialized
response.justification: Szabo is a capable senior engineer with strong technical breadth and current involvement in AI infrastructure. However, the role requires a director-level strategist with demonstrated expertise in advising organizations on cloud/AI adoption and identifying future product directions. His background is primarily execution-focused rather than strategic; AI expertise is recent (current role only) without evidence of prior recognized products or platforms. While his entrepreneurial background and technical depth are assets, they don't substitute for the strategic customer advisory and industry thought leadership this role demands.
